audit_items.proof_trace: All free operations in sparkline.c are correct: freeSparklineSequence frees each sample label (unique zstrdup copies, no aliasing) then seq->samples then seq with no subsequent accesses; sparklineRenderRange frees the local chars buffer only after the rendering loop exits and never accesses it again; zrealloc in sparklineSequenceAddSample frees the old samples buffer internally and the new pointer is immediately stored back. No pointer is dereferenced after being freed, and no double-free path exists.
